groupings.title: App Design
groupings.description: Build Expo Router screens, native-feeling UI, styling, data fetching, and API routes.

groupings.title: Native Platform
groupings.description: Work with Expo native modules, SwiftUI, Jetpack Compose, App Clips, and brownfield apps.

groupings.title: Deploy and Observe
groupings.description: Ship apps with EAS Build, EAS Workflows, EAS Update, EAS Observe, stores, and hosting.

groupings.title: Maintenance
groupings.description: Upgrade Expo SDK versions and fix dependency, cache, and migration issues.
